case_title: ALBERA, JIM vs. CHISM, PAMELA et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHISM, PAMELA
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBERA, JIM COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-25-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 504 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.63 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBERA, JIM
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CHISM, PAMELA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHISM, PAMELA

DEPARTMENT 504. JUDGE GEORGE T. CHOPPELAS. D. CARTER, CLERK. MAUREEN BRADY, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: DAVID WASSERMAN, ATTY. FOR PLAINTIFF JIM ALBERA WHO WAS ALSO PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAMELA CHISM WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. 10:05 A.M. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. CASE SETTLED ON THE COURT RECORD PRIOR TO OPENING STATEMENTS AND TESTIMONY BY WITNESSES. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 344 BRAZIL AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. WRIT SHALL ISSUE FORTHWITH, HOWEVER PHYSICAL EVICTION IS STAYED THROUGH 4/20/98. SHOULD DEFENDANT PAMEL CHISM VACATE ON OR BEFORE 4/20/98 WRIT SHALL NOT BE ENFORCED. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO WAIVE PAST DUE RENT BUT WILL COLLECT SECTION EIGHT HUD MONEY FOR THE AMOUNT OF TIME DEFENDANT OCCUPIED THE PREMISE HEREIN. TERMS OF THIS SETTLEMENT TO BE MEMORIALIZED IN WRITTEN FORM AND SIGNED BY THE DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHISM, PAMELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 344 BRAZIL AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY UNTIL MIDNIGHT APRIL 20, 1998.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHISM, PAMELA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBERA, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT CHISM, PAMELA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
